description: Product Description Natural & Sustainable. Effective Cleaning Pop-Up Sponges are both durable and effective enough to be used for all manner of household use. These sponges are made with highly absorbent natural cellulose which foams very easily and is soft and pliable enough to be squeezed into tight spaces. They are also non-scratch, making them effective for cleaning pots, pans, glassware and household surfaces. Our pop-up sponges are compressed to up to 90% of their original size but will expand when placed in water. Features: Multi Purpose: Soft And Super Absorbent: Washing Up Sponges: Flexible Odor Resi Multi-Purpose Usage Our scrub sponge easy to clean your dishes, pots, pans, sinks, stoves, household appliances, counter tops, bathtub or even your car. Keep your kitchen and household appliances shiny and neat after using the scrubbing sponges. Just put a little detergent, you can squeeze the rich foam.Absorption capacity is good, and special materials are more durable. After use non-scratch scrub sponge, you only need to wash it in running water a few times, or put it in the dishwasher for disinfection.
